video_description: Replying to @astoris_56  *iPhone 13 Pro – Quick Overview* 📆 *Launch Date:* September 2021   📱 *Display:* 6.1" Super Retina XDR OLED, 120Hz, HDR10, Dolby Vision   ⚙️ *Chipset:* Apple A15 Bionic (5nm)   💾 *Storage Options:* 128GB / 256GB / 512GB / 1TB – 6GB RAM   📷 *Rear Cameras:*   - 12MP (wide, OIS)   - 12MP (telephoto, 3x zoom)   - 12MP (ultrawide)   - TOF 3D LiDAR scanner   🤳 *Front Camera:* 12MP + SL 3D (depth/Face ID)   🎥 *Video:* 4K@60fps (rear/front), ProRes, Dolby Vision   🔋 *Battery:* 3095mAh, 23W wired, 15W MagSafe   📦 *OS:* iOS 15 (upgradable to iOS 18.5)   💧 *Build:* Ceramic Shield front, stainless steel frame, IP68 ✅ *Pros:*   ✔ Smooth 120Hz display   ✔ Pro-level camera system   ✔ Strong battery life   ✔ Excellent performance   ✔ Solid build + water resistance   ❌ *Cons:*   ✘ No USB-C   ✘ No Touch ID   ✘ Expensive storage upgrades #fyp #1mviews #PhoneReview #durabilitytest #iphone13pro #TechTok #videoviral
